de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class TermFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.TermFactory

  • public final class TermFactory
extends Object
    The TermFactory is the only way to create terms using constructors of class Term or any of its subclasses. It is the only class that implements and may exploit knowledge about sub classes of Term. All other classes of the system only know about terms what the Term class offers them. This class is used to encapsulate knowledge about the internal term structures. See TermBuilder for more convenient methods to create terms.

        Master method for term creation. Should be the only place where terms are created in the entire system.
